query: SELECT a.id, a.apt_name, a.sigungu, a.dong, MAX(CAST(t.price_krw AS UNSIGNED)) as max_price, MAX(CAST(t.area_m2 AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as max_area FROM apartments a LEFT JOIN transactions t ON a.id = t.apt_id WHERE CAST(t.price_krw AS UNSIGNED) <= 5000000000 AND CAST(t.area_m2 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) >= 60 GROUP BY a.id LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 45SeMPVVWbWtu9a.7862c7fde036 --database Q77QHiwVKcvLETyWsxWgjH --execute SELECT a.id, a.apt_name, a.sigungu, a.dong, MAX(CAST(t.price_krw AS UNSIGNED)) as max_price, MAX(CAST(t.area_m2 AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as max_area FROM apartments a LEFT JOIN transactions t ON a.id = t.apt_id WHERE CAST(t.price_krw AS UNSIGNED) <= 5000000000 AND CAST(t.area_m2 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) >= 60 GROUP BY a.id LIMIT 10;
